user_query: Which activity helps Nate escape and stimulates his imagination?

selected_nodes.text: Nate sees playing games as his escape from life struggles and doesn't get too competitive over them.
selected_nodes.reasoning: Nate sees playing games as an escape from struggles, which can also stimulate his imagination.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Nate finds comfort and creativity in hanging out with turtles, which helps him escape and stimulates his imagination.
